* Trip lookup: find a trip by tripId across all cached GTFS-RT feeds.\n *\n * Scans all parsed feeds for a matching trip_update and returns\n * structured stop-by-stop progress data for the trip tracker.\n *\n * Enforces a 24h TTL on trip share links — trips older than 24h from\n * first access are no longer accessible even if still in the feed.\n */\n\nimport type { StationIndex } from \"@mta-my-way/shared\";\nimport { getAllParsedFeeds } from \"./cache.js\";\n\n// NYCT extension keys\nconst NYCT_TRIP_KEY = \".transit_realtime.nyctTripDescriptor\";\nconst NYCT_STU_KEY = \".transit_realtime.nyctStopTimeUpdate\";\n\n// Trip share link TTL: 24 hours in milliseconds\nconst TRIP_SHARE_TTL_MS = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;\n\n// Track when each trip was first seen for TTL enforcement\nconst tripFirstSeen = new Map<string, number>();\n\n// Prune stale entries every 5 minutes\nconst PRUNE_INTERVAL_MS = 300_000;\nlet lastPrune = Date.now();\n\nexport interface TripStopInfo {\n  stopId: string;\n  stationId: string | null;\n  stationName: string;\n  arrivalTime: number | null;\n  departureTime: number | null;\n  scheduledTrack: string | null;\n  actualTrack: string | null;\n}\n\nexport interface TripData {\n  tripId: string;\n  routeId: string;\n  direction: \"N\" | \"S\" | null;\n  destination: string;\n  isAssigned: boolean;\n  trainId: string | null;\n  stops: TripStopInfo[];\n  currentStopIndex: number;\n  updatedAt: number;\n  feedAge: number;\n  progressPercent: number;\n  remainingStops: number;\n  totalStops: number;\n}\n\nfunction toUnixSeconds(v: number | { toNumber(): number } | null | undefined): number | null {\n  if (v == null) return null;\n  const n = typeof v === \"number\" ? v : v.toNumber();\n  return n === 0 ? null : n;\n}\n\nfunction resolveStationName(stationId: string | null, stations: StationIndex): string {\n  if (!stationId || !stations[stationId]) return stationId ?? \"Unknown\";\n  return stations[stationId].name;\n}\n\n/**\n * Build a reverse map from platform stop ID → station ID.\n * Reuses the same logic as the transformer but is self-contained here.\n */\nfunction buildStopToStationIdMap(stations: StationIndex): Map<string, string> {\n  const map = new Map<string, string>();\n  for (const station of Object.values(stations)) {\n    map.set(station.northStopId, station.id);\n    map.set(station.southStopId, station.id);\n  }\n  return map;\n}\n\n/**\n * Infer direction from the first and last stop IDs.\n * NYCT platform stop IDs end in N or S.\n */\nfunction inferDirection(stops: TripStopInfo[]): \"N\" | \"S\" | null {\n  if (stops.length < 2) return null;\n  const firstStopId = stops[0]!.stopId;\n  if (firstStopId.endsWith(\"N\")) return \"N\";\n  if (firstStopId.endsWith(\"S\")) return \"S\";\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Find the current stop index: the last stop that has passed (departure in the past).\n * If no stops have passed, returns -1 (train hasn't departed yet).\n */\nfunction findCurrentStopIndex(stops: TripStopInfo[], nowSeconds: number): number {\n  let lastPassed = -1;\n  for (let i = 0; i < stops.length; i++) {\n    const stop = stops[i]!;\n    const departure = stop.departureTime ?? stop.arrivalTime;\n    if (departure !== null && departure < nowSeconds) {\n      lastPassed = i;\n    }\n  }\n  return lastPassed;\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if a trip has exceeded the 24h TTL.\n * Tracks first-seen time and enforces expiry.\n */\nfunction isTripExpired(tripId: string, now: number): boolean {\n  const firstSeen = tripFirstSeen.get(tripId);\n\n  if (firstSeen === undefined) {\n    // First time seeing this trip — record the timestamp\n    tripFirstSeen.set(tripId, now);\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  // Check if trip has exceeded TTL\n  return now - firstSeen > TRIP_SHARE_TTL_MS;\n}\n\n/**\n * Prune stale trip tracking entries to prevent memory leak.\n * Called periodically during lookup.\n */\nfunction pruneStaleTrips(now: number): void {\n  if (now - lastPrune < PRUNE_INTERVAL_MS) return;\n\n  for (const [tripId, firstSeen] of tripFirstSeen) {\n    if (now - firstSeen > TRIP_SHARE_TTL_MS * 2) {\n      tripFirstSeen.delete(tripId);\n    }\n  }\n  lastPrune = now;\n}\n\n/**\n * Look up a trip by tripId across all cached feeds.\n * Returns null if the trip is not found in any feed or has exceeded the 24h TTL.\n */\nexport function lookupTrip(tripId: string, stations: StationIndex): TripData | null {\n  const nowMs = Date.now();\n\n  // Periodic prune of stale entries\n  pruneStaleTrips(nowMs);\n\n  // Check TTL before doing any work\n  if (isTripExpired(tripId, nowMs)) {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  const parsedFeeds = getAllParsedFeeds();\n  const stopToStationId = buildStopToStationIdMap(stations);\n  const nowSeconds = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);\n\n  for (const [_feedId, parsed] of parsedFeeds) {\n    for (const entity of parsed.message.entity) {\n      if (entity.isDeleted || !entity.tripUpdate) continue;\n\n      const tu = entity.tripUpdate;\n      const trip = tu.trip;\n      if (!trip?.tripId || trip.tripId !== tripId) continue;\n\n      const routeId = trip.routeId ?? \"\";\n\n      // NYCT trip descriptor\n      // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\n      const nyctTrip = (trip as any)[NYCT_TRIP_KEY] as\n        | { isAssigned?: boolean | null; trainId?: string | null }\n        | null\n        | undefined;\n      const isAssigned = nyctTrip?.isAssigned ?? false;\n      const trainId = nyctTrip?.trainId ?? null;\n\n      const stopTimeUpdates = tu.stopTimeUpdate ?? [];\n\n      // Build stops array\n      const stops: TripStopInfo[] = stopTimeUpdates.map((stu) => {\n        const platformStopId = stu.stopId ?? \"\";\n        const stationId = stopToStationId.get(platformStopId) ?? null;\n\n        // NYCT stop time extension\n        // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\n        const nyctStu = (stu as any)[NYCT_STU_KEY] as\n          | { scheduledTrack?: string | null; actualTrack?: string | null }\n          | null\n          | undefined;\n\n        return {\n          stopId: platformStopId,\n          stationId,\n          stationName: resolveStationName(stationId, stations),\n          arrivalTime: toUnixSeconds(stu.arrival?.time),\n          departureTime: toUnixSeconds(stu.departure?.time),\n          scheduledTrack: nyctStu?.scheduledTrack ?? null,\n          actualTrack: nyctStu?.actualTrack ?? null,\n        };\n      });\n\n      // Determine destination from the last stop\n      const lastStop = stops[stops.length - 1];\n      const destination = lastStop?.stationName ?? \"\";\n\n      const direction = inferDirection(stops);\n      const currentStopIndex = findCurrentStopIndex(stops, nowSeconds);\n\n      // Feed age\n      const feedTimestamp = Number(parsed.message.header.timestamp);\n      const feedAge = nowSeconds - feedTimestamp;\n\n      // Calculate progress: percentage of stops passed (excluding current)\n      // If currentStopIndex is -1 or 0, progress is 0% (train hasn't departed or at first stop)\n      // If currentStopIndex is lastStopIndex, progress is ~100% (arrived)\n      const lastStopIndex = stops.length - 1;\n      const totalStops = stops.length;\n      const progressPercent =\n        lastStopIndex > 0 ? Math.max(0, Math.round((currentStopIndex / lastStopIndex) * 100)) : 0;\n      const remainingStops = Math.max(0, lastStopIndex - currentStopIndex);\n\n      return {\n        tripId,\n        routeId,\n        direction,\n        destination,\n        isAssigned,\n        trainId,\n        stops,\n        currentStopIndex,\n        updatedAt: nowSeconds,\n        feedAge,\n        progressPercent,\n        remainingStops,\n        totalStops,\n      };\n    }\n  }\n\n  return null;\n}\n","numLines":241,"startLine":1,"totalLines":241}}}

v : v.toNumber();\n  return n === 0 ? null : n;\n}\n\nfunction resolveStationName(stationId: string | null, stations: StationIndex): string {\n  if (!stationId || !stations[stationId]) return stationId ?? \"Unknown\";\n  return stations[stationId].name;\n}\n\n/**\n * Build a reverse map from platform stop ID → station ID.\n * Reuses the same logic as the transformer but is self-contained here.\n */\nfunction buildStopToStationIdMap(stations: StationIndex): Map<string, string> {\n  const map = new Map<string, string>();\n  for (const station of Object.values(stations)) {\n    map.set(station.northStopId, station.id);\n    map.set(station.southStopId, station.id);\n  }\n  return map;\n}\n\n/**\n * Infer direction from the first and last stop IDs.\n * NYCT platform stop IDs end in N or S.\n */\nfunction inferDirection(stops: TripStopInfo[]): \"N\" | \"S\" | null {\n  if (stops.length < 2) return null;\n  const firstStopId = stops[0]!.stopId;\n  if (firstStopId.endsWith(\"N\")) return \"N\";\n  if (firstStopId.endsWith(\"S\")) return \"S\";\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Find the current stop index: the last stop that has passed (departure in the past).\n * If no stops have passed, returns -1 (train hasn't departed yet).\n */\nfunction findCurrentStopIndex(stops: TripStopInfo[], nowSeconds: number): number {\n  let lastPassed = -1;\n  for (let i = 0; i < stops.length; i++) {\n    const stop = stops[i]!;\n    const departure = stop.departureTime ?? stop.arrivalTime;\n    if (departure !== null && departure < nowSeconds) {\n      lastPassed = i;\n    }\n  }\n  return lastPassed;\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if a trip has exceeded the 24h TTL.\n * Tracks first-seen time and enforces expiry.\n */\nfunction isTripExpired(tripId: string, now: number): boolean {\n  const firstSeen = tripFirstSeen.get(tripId);\n\n  if (firstSeen === undefined) {\n    // First time seeing this trip — record the timestamp\n    tripFirstSeen.set(tripId, now);\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  // Check if trip has exceeded TTL\n  return now - firstSeen > TRIP_SHARE_TTL_MS;\n}\n\n/**\n * Prune stale trip tracking entries to prevent memory leak.\n * Called periodically during lookup.\n */\nfunction pruneStaleTrips(now: number): void {\n  if (now - lastPrune < PRUNE_INTERVAL_MS) return;\n\n  for (const [tripId, firstSeen] of tripFirstSeen) {\n    if (now - firstSeen > TRIP_SHARE_TTL_MS * 2) {\n      tripFirstSeen.delete(tripId);\n    }\n  }\n  lastPrune = now;\n}\n\n/**\n * Look up a trip by tripId across all cached feeds.\n * Returns null if the trip is not found in any feed or has exceeded the 24h TTL.\n */\nexport function lookupTrip(tripId: string, stations: StationIndex): TripData | null {\n  const nowMs = Date.now();\n\n  // Periodic prune of stale entries\n  pruneStaleTrips(nowMs);\n\n  // Check TTL before doing any work\n  if (isTripExpired(tripId, nowMs)) {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  const parsedFeeds = getAllParsedFeeds();\n  const stopToStationId = buildStopToStationIdMap(stations);\n  const nowSeconds = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);\n\n  for (const [_feedId, parsed] of parsedFeeds) {\n    for (const entity of parsed.message.entity) {\n      if (entity.isDeleted || !entity.tripUpdate) continue;\n\n      const tu = entity.tripUpdate;\n      const trip = tu.trip;\n      if (!trip?.tripId || trip.tripId !== tripId) continue;\n\n      const routeId = trip.routeId ?? \"\";\n\n      // NYCT trip descriptor\n      // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\n      const nyctTrip = (trip as any)[NYCT_TRIP_KEY] as\n        | { isAssigned?: boolean | null; trainId?: string | null }\n        | null\n        | undefined;\n      const isAssigned = nyctTrip?.isAssigned ?? false;\n      const trainId = nyctTrip?.trainId ?? null;\n\n      const stopTimeUpdates = tu.stopTimeUpdate ?? [];\n\n      // Build stops array\n      const stops: TripStopInfo[] = stopTimeUpdates.map((stu) => {\n        const platformStopId = stu.stopId ?? \"\";\n        const stationId = stopToStationId.get(platformStopId) ?? null;\n\n        // NYCT stop time extension\n        // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\n        const nyctStu = (stu as any)[NYCT_STU_KEY] as\n          | { scheduledTrack?: string | null; actualTrack?: string | null }\n          | null\n          | undefined;\n\n        return {\n          stopId: platformStopId,\n          stationId,\n          stationName: resolveStationName(stationId, stations),\n          arrivalTime: toUnixSeconds(stu.arrival?.time),\n          departureTime: toUnixSeconds(stu.departure?.time),\n          scheduledTrack: nyctStu?.scheduledTrack ?? null,\n          actualTrack: nyctStu?.actualTrack ?? null,\n        };\n      });\n\n      // Determine destination from the last stop\n      const lastStop = stops[stops.length - 1];\n      const destination = lastStop?.stationName ?? \"\";\n\n      const direction = inferDirection(stops);\n      const currentStopIndex = findCurrentStopIndex(stops, nowSeconds);\n\n      // Feed age\n      const feedTimestamp = Number(parsed.message.header.timestamp);\n      const feedAge = nowSeconds - feedTimestamp;\n\n      // Calculate progress: percentage of stops passed (excluding current)\n      // If currentStopIndex is -1 or 0, progress is 0% (train hasn't departed or at first stop)\n      // If currentStopIndex is lastStopIndex, progress is ~100% (arrived)\n      const lastStopIndex = stops.length - 1;\n      const totalStops = stops.length;\n      const progressPercent =\n        lastStopIndex > 0 ? Math.max(0, Math.round((currentStopIndex / lastStopIndex) * 100)) : 0;\n      const remainingStops = Math.max(0, lastStopIndex - currentStopIndex);\n\n      return {\n        tripId,\n        routeId,\n        direction,\n        destination,\n        isAssigned,\n        trainId,\n        stops,\n        currentStopIndex,\n        updatedAt: nowSeconds,\n        feedAge,\n        progressPercent,\n        remainingStops,\n        totalStops,\n      };\n    }\n  }\n\n  return null;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":206,"oldLines":8,"newStart":206,"newLines":8,"lines":["       const currentStopIndex = findCurrentStopIndex(stops, nowSeconds);"," ","       // Feed age","-      const feedTimestamp = Number(parsed.message.header.timestamp);","-      const feedAge = nowSeconds - feedTimestamp;","+      const feedTimestampSeconds = toUnixSeconds(parsed.message.header.timestamp) ?? nowSeconds;","+      const feedAge = nowSeconds - feedTimestampSeconds;"," ","       // Calculate progress: percentage of stops passed (excluding current)","       // If currentStopIndex is -1 or 0, progress is 0% (train hasn't departed or at first stop)"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}
